name: Loan For Any Purpose
description_short: Loan For Any Purpose offers personal, installment, title, payday, and cash advance loans ranging from $250 to $50,000 at a Detroit, MI branch, welcoming all credit types.
description_long:
Loan For Any Purpose is a multi-product consumer lender with physical branch locations, including a Detroit, MI office at 3403 Grand River Ave and a second location in Atlanta, GA. The company operates under a broad mandate of accessible lending, marketing to borrowers across the credit spectrum with an emphasis on speed and minimal documentation requirements.

The lender offers a wide product suite covering virtually every tier of consumer borrowing. Cash advances and payday loans serve borrowers needing under $1,000 quickly. Installment loans target those needing $1,000–$5,000. Personal loans extend up to $50,000 for higher-credit applicants. Title loans — secured against a vehicle — also reach $50,000 and are explicitly available to all credit types. Same-day loan approval with minimum document requirements is marketed across most products. Bad credit loans are offered as a standalone product for $250–$50,000.

What distinguishes Loan For Any Purpose is the breadth of products under one roof: a borrower can walk in needing $300 for an emergency or $40,000 for a major expense and find a product marketed to them. The company also states that submitting an application does not affect a borrower's FICO score, instead pulling from non-traditional consumer reporting agencies. The Detroit branch maintains extended weekday hours (7am–8pm) and weekend hours (9am–6pm), which is notably more accessible than typical bank branches.

Honest assessment: the company's own disclosures are clear that its products are 'designed to meet short-term financial needs' and are 'not intended as a long-term borrowing solution.' Rates, terms, and product availability vary by state and applicant and are not disclosed on the page — a significant transparency gap. Borrowers should expect high APRs on short-term products (payday, cash advance) and should carefully review terms before accepting any offer. The company explicitly recommends that those with ongoing credit difficulties consult a certified credit counselor.
pros: Wide loan range from $250 to $50,000 covers both emergency and larger borrowing needs
All credit types explicitly welcomed on most products including title and installment loans
Applying does not affect FICO score — uses non-traditional credit reporting agencies
Same-day loan approval with minimum documents required
Physical branch location in Detroit available for in-person service
Multiple loan types under one roof — payday, installment, title, personal, cash advance
cons: No APR or rate information disclosed on the website — borrowers cannot compare costs upfront
Products explicitly described as short-term solutions, not suitable for ongoing financial needs
Verification process may add up to two business days to funding despite same-day approval marketing
Personal loans up to $50,000 require a higher credit score, limiting access for bad-credit borrowers on larger amounts
Only two physical locations (Detroit and Atlanta) — limited geographic footprint for in-person borrowers
best_for: Bad-credit borrowers in Detroit or Atlanta needing fast access to small amounts under $1,000
Vehicle owners with equity who want a title loan up to $50,000 without a credit check barrier
Borrowers who need $1,000–$5,000 and want an installment loan with flexible credit requirements
Consumers who want to apply without a hard FICO inquiry before committing
diagnosis: Loan For Any Purpose is best for borrowers with limited or damaged credit who need fast access to cash and want a single lender covering small emergency amounts through mid-size installment loans, or who own a vehicle and can leverage a title loan. The main caveat is a complete lack of rate transparency — APRs are not published, so borrowers must apply to know the actual cost of borrowing.
services: Cash advance loans (under $1,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Payday loans (up to $1,000, all credit types)
Same-day loans (fast approval, minimum documents, all credit types)
Title loans (secured, up to $50,000, all credit types)
Bad credit loans ($250–$50,000, all credit types)
Installment loans ($1,000–$5,000, unsecured, all credit types)
Personal loans (up to $50,000, unsecured, higher credit score recommended)
In-person branch service at Detroit, MI location
Non-FICO soft-pull credit review during application
